Package org.mitre.synthea.helpers

Class TransitionMetrics

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.helpers.TransitionMetrics
public abstract class TransitionMetrics extends Object
Class to track state and transition metrics from the modules. At the end of the simulation this class can print out debugging statistics for each module/state: - How many people hit that state - What states they transitioned to - How long they were in that state (ex, Guard, Delay)

    static class 
    TransitionMetrics.Metric
    Helper class to track the metrics of a single State.

  • Method Details

    • enter

      public static void enter(String module, String state, boolean firstTime)
      Track entering a state within a given module.
      Parameters:
      module - The name of the module.
      state - The name of the state.
      firstTime - Whether or not this state was previously entered.

    • exit

      public static void exit(String module, String state, String destination, long duration)
      Track exiting a state and the resulting destination.
      Parameters:
      module - The name of the module.
      state - The name of the state.
      destination - Target state that was transitioned to.
      duration - The time in milliseconds spent within the state.

    • exportMetrics

      public static void exportMetrics()
      Exports the metrics as JSON in the exporter base directory.
